propositions: Freeze two versioned ground-truth corpora (outcome + finding-adjudication) under runs/ with a README, committing mining/adjudication/kappa scripts and making no changes under src/.

Mine an outcome corpus with one row per reviewed ticket carrying post_claim_edit_class and event-derived counts (reopen_count, force_close, completion_verifier_fail_count, review_round_count) using a reopen-safe post-claim window and closed §5.2 vocabulary.
Re-verify the §5 SOTA report headline figures against the frozen corpus, recording each derived figure as AGREES or CORRECTED-TO beside the published value.

On-disk active+.retired event scan is insufficient for compacted tickets whose CREATE/STATUS events were folded into SNAPSHOTs, forcing a git-object walk across tickets-branch refs as the required recovery path.

Text-less findings (empty finding statement, pre-4e19/e344 lean sidecar schema) are not adjudicatable and are excluded, requiring a rebuilt seed-1729 stratified sample bucketed positionally by coverage.counts rather than by decision.

LLM A/B inter-rater kappa is only moderate (~0.47, AC1 0.58, raw 0.77) and is reported honestly rather than gated; the authoritative validity basis is operator human adjudication of 30 clustered disputes folded to final gold labels with 0 pending-human.
